title: QuizMD Frontmatter
description: JSON Schema for the YAML frontmatter of a .quiz.md file (Level 1).

title.description: Quiz title. Inferred from the first # H1 if omitted.

lang.description: BCP 47 language tag (e.g. en, fr, es).

reveal.description: all — all questions visible at once. sequential — one at a time.

feedback_mode.description: immediate — feedback shown after each answer. deferred — feedback shown at the end.

time_limit.description: Global time limit for the entire quiz, in seconds.

shuffle_questions.description: Randomise question order on each attempt.

shuffle_answers.description: Randomise answer choice order for MCQ and multi-select questions.
